plugins.name: claude-format-hook
plugins.description: Auto-format code after Claude edits files. Honors project-level treefmt/dprint if configured; otherwise picks biome/prettier/ruff/goimports/rustfmt/shfmt/taplo/ktlint by extension. Covers JS/TS/JSON, Python, Markdown, YAML, CSS/SCSS, HTML, shell, TOML, Go, Rust, and Kotlin.
